user.title: Quatt device
user.description: What kind of Quatt device do you want to add?

local.description: Set up local connection to the Quatt heatpump.

data_description.add_remote: Add remote connectivity through the Quatt mobile API to retrieve additional heatpump data.

auth.title: Sign in to the Quatt mobile API
auth.description: Enter your name to create an anonymous account with the Quatt mobile API. These details are only stored locally in Home Assistant and reused for all Quatt devices you add.

pair.title: Pair with the Quatt device
pair.description:
Press the button on your CIC device to complete pairing.

> **{cic}**

![Pairing button location](/quatt_static/pair.png)
Complete pairing within 60 seconds.

Press 'Submit' to start the pairing process and wait for confirmation.

home_battery.title: Pair with a Quatt home battery

home_battery_qr.title: Pair via QR code
home_battery_qr.description:
Scan the QR code on the battery and paste the URL below.

![Battery QR code label location](/quatt_static/battery_pair.png)

data_description.home_battery_qr_url:
Scan the QR code and copy the link:
- **iOS**: long-press the QR suggestion → Copy Link
- **Android**: Google Lens / camera scan → Copy
- Any barcode app (ZXing, Binary Eye) that shows the raw text

home_battery_manual.title: Pair manually
home_battery_manual.description:
Enter the **UUID**, **serial number** and **check code** found on the battery label.

![Battery pairing label location](/quatt_static/battery_pair.png)

error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to your local CIC. Check the IP address.
error.pairing_timeout: Pairing timeout. Please try again and press the button on the CIC device within 60 seconds.
error.home_battery_qr_invalid: Invalid QR code URL. Make sure to copy the full URL from the battery QR code.
error.home_battery_pair_failed: Home battery pairing failed. Please check the access key, serial number and check code.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_in_progress: A configuration flow for this Quatt device is already in progress.

data_description.scan_interval: Number of seconds between requesting information from the Quatt.
data_description.remote_scan_interval: Number of minutes between requesting information from the mobile Quatt API.
data_description.power_sensor: External energy sensor that measures the current energy consumption of the Quatt.
data_description.add_remote: Add remote connectivity through the Quatt mobile API to retrieve additional heatpump data.
